name: Polar Six
explanation: A warm 6-voice analog polysynth in the Sequential / Chroma Polaris lineage. Its signature is oscillator hard sync: a second sawtooth is locked to the first's period but runs at a higher ratio set by Sync, so sweeping Sync gives the classic tearing sync-lead harmonics. A third gently-detuned saw layer (Detune) adds analog warmth, and a smooth resonant two-pole low-pass with its own envelope shapes the tone. 6-voice poly. Controls: Cutoff, Resonance, Env Amount, Sync (sync ratio), Detune (warmth layer) and Level.
